description: Benchmark reference fixture for 8760 constant hourly cooling demand aggregation.
method: Energy Calculation Parity / Annual 8760 Energy Balance
sourceReference: Internal benchmark reference values derived from constant hourly loads; no external parity claim.
assumptions: Each hourly record represents one hour.
Expected cooling demand is 500 W x 8760 h / 1000.
notes: This is a deterministic benchmark reference fixture, not ExternalParityCovered evidence.
